ddls:
CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the staff member */,
  "mobile" TEXT /* Mobile phone number of the staff member */,
  "best_contact_no" TEXT /* Preferred contact number of the staff member */,
  "DOB" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the staff member */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Highest degree achieved by the staff member */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status of the staff member */,
  "first_language" TEXT /* First language of the staff member */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the staff member */,
  "educational_background" TEXT /* Educational background of the staff member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date of hire */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the staff member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the student */,
  "mobile" TEXT /* Mobile phone number of the student */,
  "best_contact_no" TEXT /* Preferred contact number of the student */,
  "DOB" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree program of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the student */,
  "first_language" TEXT /* First language of the student */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the student */,
  "educational_background" TEXT /* Educational background of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Academic program of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, on-campus) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course (e.g., one semester, full year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty assignment */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member assigned to the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taught */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course is offered */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year when the course is offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_assignments_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course is taken */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year when the course is taken */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade received in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_history" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student attending the session */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the session is for */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance status of the student */,
  "participation" TEXT /* Participation level of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_history_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_history_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact preference */,
  "staff_or_student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff or student */,
  "contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Value for the preferred contact method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_preferences_staff_or_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_or_student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_preferences_staff_or_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_or_student_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "staff_or_student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff or student */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_staff_or_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_or_student_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_staff_or_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_or_student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_proficiencies" (
  "proficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language proficiency */,
  "staff_or_student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff or student */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency in the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_proficiencies_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_proficiencies_staff_or_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_or_student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_proficiencies_staff_or_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_or_student_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)
